steps.title: Identify the student's defining goal
steps.content: The student wants to “emphasize a similarity” between the two artworks. Both Lady in Brown and Mobile: Pittsburgh share one critical characteristic: they are both Carnegie Prize gold medal winners.

steps.title: Select the choice that emphasizes the shared achievement
steps.content: Choice A directly accomplishes this by stating both artworks won the same award — the Carnegie Prize gold medal. Choices B, C, and D either isolate one artwork, shift focus to institutional scope, or explicitly emphasize the artworks' material difference. That matches choice A — A is correct.
